column1: # Maps each agent-prompt mirror in this dir to its live Paperclip agent + intended org placement.
# kind: existing = already live (has an id; sync-agents.sh diff/pull/push operates on it)
#       new      = authored here, NOT yet created live (id "-"; create via the Paperclip API, see README.md)
# reportsTo = the agent's MANAGER (org placement). DOCUMENTATION ONLY — sync-agents.sh syncs prompt
#       bodies, never reportsTo; org edges are set via PATCH /api/agents/<id> {reportsTo} (existing) or
#       at agent creation (new). The CEO is top-of-org (reportsTo "-").
# NOTE: the roster below the CEO is INTENTIONALLY empty — the CEO's first mandate is to re-assess and
#       PROPOSE a lean team for board approval; add rows here (kind=new) once that hiring plan is approved.
